channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: yandex/yaff
item.description: YaFF is a high-performance C++ serialization library that provides a zero-copy wire format for the Protobuf ecosystem.

item.title: zhongerxin/Cowart
item.description: (no description)

item.title: cloudflare/security-audit-skill
item.description: A coding-agent skill for multi-phase security audits with independently verified, machine-readable findings

item.title: DietrichGebert/ponytail
item.description: Makes your AI agent think like the laziest senior dev in the room. The best code is the code you never wrote.

item.title: zhongerxin/cowart
item.description: (no description)

item.title: overflowy/make-look-scanned
item.description: Makes PDFs look scanned (CLI or in the browser via WASM)

item.title: aidenybai/cnfast
item.description: Fast drop in replacement for `cn`

item.title: datalab-to/lift
item.description: Extract structured data from documents quickly and accurately.

item.title: StarTrail-org/PixelRAG
item.description: The end of web parsing. The beginning of scalable pixel-native search.

item.title: BuilderIO/skills
item.description: Skills for coding agents

item.title: ards-project/ard-spec
item.description: Agentic Resource Discovery (ARD) specification

item.title: eooce/transfer-api
item.description: Cloudflare Worker adapter for unlimited.surf OpenAI/Anthropic-compatible API routes.

item.title: ngrok/webernetes
item.description: Kubernetes in the browser.

item.title: Forward-Future/loop-library
item.description: Practical repeatable AI-agent workflows for engineering, evaluation, operations, content, and design.

item.title: kennss/SiliconScope
item.description: Sudoless Apple Silicon system monitor (native SwiftUI GUI) with ANE / Media Engine / memory-bandwidth tracking

item.title: KunAgent/Kun
item.description: AI agent workspace with Code and Write modes built into your application.

item.title: palmier-io/palmier-pro
item.description: macOS video editor built for AI

item.title: anthropics/launch-your-agent
item.description: Claude Code skills that take a founder from idea to a live Claude Managed Agent: interview, scope a v0, launch in their own account, grade it, iterate, and schedule it

item.title: prdgmshift/usbliter8
item.description: An A12/A13 SecureROM exploit

item.title: nubjs/nub
item.description: The all-in-one Node.js toolkit

item.title: vercel-labs/personal-agent-template
item.description: Open-source template for a durable personal AI agent — web chat, Slack, Linear, and long-term memory with user-approved saves. Eve, Nuxt, Better Auth, Vercel Connect.

item.title: unicity-astrid/handbook
item.description: How to work on Astrid: the polyrepo, the kernel-is-dumb law, the RFC trigger, contribution tiers, and the release process.

item.title: unicity-astrid/book
item.description: The canonical reference for Astrid OS: kernel, capsules, host ABI, the bus, and the security model.

item.title: shadcn/improve
item.description: Use your most capable model to audit your codebase and write plans for cheaper models to execute.

item.title: EpicGames/lore
item.description: Lore is a next-generation, open source revision control system

item.title: vercel/eve
item.description: The Framework for Building Agents

item.title: strands-agents/shell
item.description: Give your agent a shell without giving it the keys to your machine.

item.title: Waishnav/devspace
item.description: Turn ChatGPT into Codex

item.title: Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything
item.description: Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.

item.title: VitoHowe/glm-coding
item.description: (no description)

item.title: bjarneo/ku
item.description: A fast, keyboard-driven Kubernetes TUI. Browse any resource, edit objects, follow logs, and shell into pods. Inspired by k9s, Lens, and lazygit.
